mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.work_status IN (2, 3) THEN p.id END) as active, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.employment_type = 1 AND e.work_status IN (2, 3) THEN p.id END) as fullTime, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.employment_type = 2 AND e.work_status IN (2, 3) THEN p.id END) as partTime, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.employment_type = 4 AND e.work_status IN (2, 3) THEN p.id END) as intern, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.work_status = 2 THEN p.id WHEN e.work_status = 3 AND e.entry_date IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(e.probation_months, 0) > 0 AND DATE_ADD(e.entry_date, INTERVAL e.probation_months MONTH) >= CURDATE() THEN p.id END) as probation, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.work_status = 3 AND NOT ( e.entry_date IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(e.probation_months, 0) > 0 AND DATE_ADD(e.entry_date, INTERVAL e.probation_months MONTH) >= CURDATE() ) THEN p.id END) as formal, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.work_status = 4 THEN p.id END) as leaving, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.employment_type = 3 AND e.work_status IN (2, 3) THEN p.id END) as labor, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.work_status = 1 THEN p.id END) as onboarding FROM hr_employee_profile p LEFT JOIN hr_employee_entry e ON p.id = e.profile_id AND e.deleted = 0 AND e.tenant_id = p.tenant_id WHERE p.deleted = 0
AND p.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.work_status IN (2, 3) THEN p.id END) as active, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.employment_type = 1 AND e.work_status IN (2, 3) THEN p.id END) as fullTime, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.employment_type = 2 AND e.work_status IN (2, 3) THEN p.id END) as partTime, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.employment_type = 4 AND e.work_status IN (2, 3) THEN p.id END) as intern, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.work_status = 2 THEN p.id WHEN e.work_status = 3 AND e.entry_date IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(e.probation_months, 0) > 0 AND DATE_ADD(e.entry_date, INTERVAL e.probation_months MONTH) >= #{referenceDate} THEN p.id END) as probation, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.work_status = 3 AND NOT ( e.entry_date IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(e.probation_months, 0) > 0 AND DATE_ADD(e.entry_date, INTERVAL e.probation_months MONTH) >= #{referenceDate} ) THEN p.id END) as formal, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.work_status = 4 THEN p.id END) as leaving, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.employment_type = 3 AND e.work_status IN (2, 3) THEN p.id END) as labor, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.work_status = 1 THEN p.id END) as onboarding FROM hr_employee_profile p LEFT JOIN hr_employee_entry e ON p.id = e.profile_id AND e.deleted = 0 AND e.tenant_id = p.tenant_id WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND (p.onboard_date IS NULL OR p.onboard_date <= #{referenceDate}) AND (e.entry_date IS NULL OR e.entry_date <= #{referenceDate})
AND p.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(p.age, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.birth_date, CURDATE()))), 1) as avgAge, CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.age, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.birth_date, CURDATE())) < 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) / COUNT(1) * 100 ) END as under30, SUM( CASE WHEN p.onboard_date IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, p.onboard_date, CURDATE()) >= 36 THEN 1 WHEN p.onboard_date IS NULL AND p.company_years >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) as over3Years, CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN p.onboard_date IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, p.onboard_date, CURDATE()) >= 36 THEN 1 WHEN p.onboard_date IS NULL AND p.company_years >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) / COUNT(1) * 100 ) END as stability FROM hr_employee_profile p WHERE p.deleted = 0
AND p.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(p.age, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.birth_date, #{referenceDate}))), 1) as avgAge, CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.age, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.birth_date, #{referenceDate})) < 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) / COUNT(1) * 100 ) END as under30, SUM( CASE WHEN p.onboard_date IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, p.onboard_date, #{referenceDate}) >= 36 THEN 1 WHEN p.onboard_date IS NULL AND p.company_years >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) as over3Years, CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN p.onboard_date IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, p.onboard_date, #{referenceDate}) >= 36 THEN 1 WHEN p.onboard_date IS NULL AND p.company_years >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) / COUNT(1) * 100 ) END as stability FROM hr_employee_profile p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND (p.onboard_date IS NULL OR p.onboard_date <= #{referenceDate})
AND p.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
